Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9403 "PITSTOPII-8CD0-9403" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $8cd0 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pitstop II.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $8CD0 to setup colour RAM and display the loading screen, then wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
